constants.name: C_0
constants.source: NIST CODATA 2018: c = 299792458 m/s, rounded to 2.998e8

constants.name: ETA_0
constants.source: NIST CODATA 2018: Z0 = 376.73 ohm, rounded to 377.0

constants.name: EPSILON_0
constants.source: NIST CODATA 2018: eps0 = 8.8541878128e-12 F/m, rounded to 8.854e-12

constants.name: FCC_CLASS_B_RADIATED
constants.source: FCC 47 CFR Part 15.109(b) Class B: 30-88MHz=40dBuV/m@3m, 88-216MHz=43.5dBuV/m@3m, 216-960MHz=46dBuV/m@3m, >960MHz=54dBuV/m@3m

constants.name: FCC_CLASS_A_RADIATED
constants.source: FCC 47 CFR Part 15.109(a) Class A: 30-88MHz=39.1dBuV/m@10m, 88-216MHz=43.5dBuV/m@10m, 216-960MHz=46.4dBuV/m@10m, >960MHz=49.5dBuV/m@10m

constants.name: CISPR_25_CLASS5_RADIATED
constants.source: APPROXIMATE. CISPR 25:2021 Class 5 (ALSE method) values reproduced from Ott 'EMC Engineering' Table 18.3 and LearnEMC.com. Exact limits require paid IEC standard document.

constants.name: MIL_STD_461_RE102
constants.source: APPROXIMATE. MIL-STD-461G RE102 limits are frequency-dependent slopes, not flat. 24dBuV/m is a rough average. Exact limits require the full standard (public via everyspec.com) and vary by platform.

constants.name: STANDARDS
constants.source: Maps standard names to limit tables; standard names follow CISPR/FCC/MIL convention

0201.source: APPROXIMATE mid-range estimates. Murata 'Basics of Capacitors' app note (capacitors.murata.com) gives 0201=0.2-0.4nH, 0402=0.4-0.6nH, 0603=0.5-0.8nH, 0805=0.7-1.0nH, 1206=0.9-1.2nH. Samsung CL series app note and TDK MLF/MLA series app notes give similar ranges. ESL varies by specific part, dielectric, and capacitance.

0402.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, mid-range estimate

0603.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, mid-range estimate

0805.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, mid-range estimate

1206.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, mid-range estimate

1210.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, mid-range estimate

1812.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, extrapolated from smaller packages

2220.source: Murata/Samsung/TDK MLCC app notes, extrapolated from smaller packages

0201.source: APPROXIMATE mid-range estimates for X5R/X7R at 1MHz. ESR varies widely with capacitance value, voltage rating, and manufacturer. Murata SimSurfing tool and Samsung MLCC catalog give 0402=0.2-0.5ohm, 0603=0.05-0.2ohm, 0805=0.03-0.08ohm for typical 100nF X7R parts.

0402.source: Murata/Samsung MLCC specs, mid-range for 100nF X7R

0603.source: Murata/Samsung MLCC specs, mid-range for 100nF X7R

0805.source: Murata/Samsung MLCC specs, mid-range for 100nF X7R

1206.source: Murata/Samsung MLCC specs, mid-range for 100nF X7R

1210.source: Murata/Samsung MLCC specs, mid-range for 100nF X7R

constants.name: DIFF_PAIR_PROTOCOLS
constants.source: USB 2.0 spec (USBIF): skew 25ps, Z=90ohm. USB 3.x: skew 5ps. Ethernet IEEE 802.3: skew 50ps, Z=100ohm. HDMI 2.0 spec: skew 15ps. LVDS TIA/EIA-644: Z=100ohm. PCIe CEM spec: skew 5ps. SATA spec: Z=100ohm. MIPI D-PHY: Z=100ohm. CAN ISO 11898-2: Z=120ohm. RS-485 TIA-485: Z=120ohm. Individual entries need per-standard verification.

constants.name: MARKET_STANDARDS
constants.source: US: FCC Part 15. EU: EN 55032 (CISPR 32) + IEC 61000-4-2 (ESD) + IEC 61000-4-3 (immunity). Automotive: CISPR 25. Medical: IEC 60601-1-2. Military: MIL-STD-461G. Standard-market mappings from EMC compliance guides.

constants.name: clock_patterns
constants.source: Standard clock signal naming conventions from KiCad default libs, STM32/NXP/TI reference designs. clk/clock/xtal/osc/mclk/bclk/sclk/pclk/hclk/fclk/lrclk/hse/lse/xin/xout/clkin/clkout

constants.name: hs_patterns
constants.source: Standard high-speed bus naming from KiCad libs: usb/hdmi/eth/rgmii/sgmii/pcie/ddr/sdram/lvds/mipi/sata

constants.name: check_missing_decoupling:366
constants.source: Common ESD/TVS/net-tie component value substrings (same as previous version, line shifted)

constants.name: check_connector_filtering:414
constants.source: External connector keywords (same as previous version, line shifted)

constants.name: bands
constants.source: FCC 47 CFR Part 15.109 frequency band boundaries: 30-88MHz, 88-216MHz, 216-960MHz

TPS629.source: DigiKey parametric data: TPS62912 fsw=1MHz/2.2MHz dual-mode

MP1584.source: DigiKey parametric data: MP1584 fsw=100kHz-1.5MHz adjustable, 1.5MHz max

LTC36.source: DigiKey parametric data: LTC3600 fsw=1MHz typ (adjustable 400kHz-4MHz)

MCP1603.source: Microchip DS22042B: MCP1603 fsw=2MHz fixed PWM mode

XL6009.source: XLSEMI datasheet: XL6009 fsw=400kHz typ (320-430kHz range)

constants.name: SAMPLE_INTERVAL
constants.source: Internal edge sampling interval for board edge proximity checks

constants.name: _DC_BIAS_DERATING
constants.source: APPROXIMATE. MLCC DC bias derating curves from Murata 'Basics of Capacitors' app note and Samsung MLCC technical guide. X5R/X7R derating varies by vendor and specific part. Values are conservative mid-range estimates for typical 6.3V-10V rated MLCCs.

constants.name: connector_sizes
constants.source: APPROXIMATE connector aperture dimensions from mechanical drawings. USB-C ~9mm, USB-A ~12mm, HDMI ~14mm, VGA ~30mm, RJ45 ~16mm, barrel ~6mm, SMA ~5mm, BNC ~14mm. These are rough aperture estimates for slot resonance calculations, not precision dimensions. Actual dimensions vary by manufacturer.

constants.name: plan
constants.source: Internal test plan structure template (frequency_bands, interface_risks, probe_points)

constants.name: protocol_speeds
constants.source: Protocol data rates from published specifications: USB HS 480Mbps, USB3 5Gbps, Ethernet 100Mbps/1Gbps, HDMI 4.95Gbps (1.4), LVDS 655Mbps, PCIe 8GT/s (Gen3), SATA 6Gbps, MIPI 1.5Gbps. Speed tier classification is internal heuristic.

constants.name: coverage_rules
constants.source: Internal mapping of EMC rule categories to regulatory test types (radiated→GP/SW/CK, conducted→DC/IO, esd→ES)

constants.name: severity_order
constants.source: Internal severity ordering convention: CRITICAL=0, HIGH=1, MEDIUM=2, LOW=3, INFO=4
